title: microtoena mollis
intro: Microtoena mollis is a plant species belonging to the mint family, known for its fragrant flowers and leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Microtoena mollis include its potential to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant may be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support overall well-being and immune function.
